title: E-Ticaret Siparis Semasi
subtitle: Urun, siparis ve siparis detayi iliskileri.
code:
-- Urunler
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    stock INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- Siparisler
CREATE TABLE orders (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    customer_name VARCHAR(50),
    order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beklemede'
);

-- Siparis detaylari (many-to-many: orders <-> products)
CREATE TABLE order_items (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    order_id INT NOT NULL,
    product_id INT NOT NULL,
    quantity INT NOT NULL,
    unit_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

-- Ornek veri
INSERT INTO products (name, price, stock) VALUES
    ('Laptop', 15000.00, 10),
    ('Mouse', 250.00, 50),
    ('Klavye', 450.00, 30);

INSERT INTO orders (customer_name, status) VALUES
    ('Ahmet Yilmaz', 'tamamlandi'),
    ('Ayse Kaya', 'beklemede');

INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES
    (1, 1, 1, 15000.00),
    (1, 2, 2, 250.00),
    (2, 3, 1, 450.00);

-- Her siparisin toplam tutari
SELECT
    o.id AS order_id,
    o.customer_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.id, o.customer_name;

-- En cok satilan urunler
SELECT
    p.name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_sold DESC;
